mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.contest_number, title, detail, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, host_company AS hostCompany, tech_stack AS techStack, status FROM UB_CONTEST c join UB_NOTICEBOARD n ON c.contest_number = n.contest_number WHERE status = '진행중' ORDER BY end_date ASC )
WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m.MENTORING_NUMBER AS mentoringNumber, m.MENTOR_NUMBER AS mentorNumber, m.MENTORING_TITLE AS mentoringTitle, m.MENTORING_GOAL AS mentoringGoal, s.subject_name AS subjectName, mb.member_nickname AS memberNickname, mb.member_gender AS memberGender, f.file_name AS fileName, sm.grad_school AS gradSchool, sm.grad_depart AS gradDepart FROM UB_MENTORING m JOIN UB_MEMBER mb ON m.MENTOR_NUMBER = mb.member_number LEFT JOIN UB_SUBJECT s ON m.SUBJECT_NUMBER = s.subject_number LEFT JOIN UB_FILE f ON mb.file_number = f.file_number LEFT JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTOR sm ON mb.survey_number = sm.survey_number WHERE mb.member_state = '계정 활성화' ORDER BY m.CREATED_AT DESC )
WHERE ROWNUM <= 7

SELECT employment_id AS employmentId, company_name AS companyName, employment_title AS employmentTitle, employment_location AS employmentLocation, employment_career AS employmentCareer, employment_education AS employmentEducation, employment_log AS employmentLog, employment_url AS employmentUrl FROM UB_COMPANY ORDER BY employment_id DESC
